name: GH_MemoryBitmap
summary: Utility class for ultra-fast bitmap sampling and filters.

params.name: bitmap
params.doc: Bitmap to operate on. This bitmap will be in an invalid state until the Release() function has been called.

params.name: bitmap
params.doc: Bitmap to operate on. This bitmap will be in an invalid state until the Release() function has been called.

params.name: wrap
params.doc: Wrap mode to use during sampling.

methods.name: A
methods.signature: public byte A(int x, int y)
methods.summary: Gets the alpha channel value at the given pixel coordinates.

params.name: x
params.doc: X coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

returns.doc: Value of alpha channel at given pixel or 255 if the alpha channel is not defined.

methods.name: B
methods.signature: public byte B(int x, int y)
methods.summary: Gets the blue channel value at the given pixel coordinates.

params.name: x
params.doc: X coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

returns.doc: Value of Blue channel at given pixel.

methods.name: Colour(Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public Color Colour(int x, int y)
methods.summary: Gets the colour at the given pixel coordinates.

params.name: x
params.doc: X coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

methods.name: Colour(Int32, Int32, Color)
methods.signature: public void Colour(int x, int y, Color col)
methods.summary: Sets the colour at the given pixel coordinates.

params.name: x
params.doc: X coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

params.name: col
params.doc: Color to assign.

methods.name: CopyChannel
methods.signature: public void CopyChannel(GH_BitmapChannel source, GH_BitmapChannel target)
methods.summary: Copy the contents of one channel into another.

params.name: source
params.doc: Source channel (compound channels are not allowed).

params.name: target
params.doc: Target channel (compound channels are not allowed).

methods.name: Filter_AlphaEdges
methods.signature: public void Filter_AlphaEdges(Padding padding, byte alpha_override)
methods.summary: Set the alpha component on all edges to a specific value.

params.name: padding
params.doc: Width of alpha band along all edges. Must be a valid padding construct.

params.name: alpha_override
params.doc: Value of alpha to apply.

methods.name: Filter_Blur()
methods.signature: public void Filter_Blur()
methods.summary: Blur the image in both directions.

methods.name: Filter_Blur(Int32)
methods.signature: public void Filter_Blur(int N)
methods.summary: Blur the image N times in both directions.

params.name: N
params.doc: Number of times to perform the blurring operation.

methods.name: Filter_Blur(Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public void Filter_Blur(int interior_weight, int exterior_weight)
methods.summary: Blur the image in both directions.

params.name: interior_weight
params.doc: Weighting factor for pixels at the center of the convolution matrix.

params.name: exterior_weight
params.doc: Weighting factor for pixels at the edges of the convolution matrix.

methods.name: Filter_Blur(Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public void Filter_Blur(int N, int interior_weight, int exterior_weight)
methods.summary: Blur the image N times in both directions.

params.name: N
params.doc: Number of times to perform the blurring operation.

params.name: interior_weight
params.doc: Weighting factor for pixels at the center of the convolution matrix.

params.name: exterior_weight
params.doc: Weighting factor for pixels at the edges of the convolution matrix.

methods.name: Filter_BlurAlpha
methods.signature: public void Filter_BlurAlpha(int N, int interior_weight, int exterior_weight)
methods.summary: Blur the alpha channel of the image N times in both directions.

params.name: N
params.doc: Number of times to perform the blurring operation.

params.name: interior_weight
params.doc: Weighting factor for pixels at the center of the convolution matrix.

params.name: exterior_weight
params.doc: Weighting factor for pixels at the edges of the convolution matrix.

methods.name: Filter_Contrast
methods.signature: public void Filter_Contrast(GH_BitmapChannel channel, double factor)
methods.summary: Adjust the contrast of a specific channel.

params.name: channel
params.doc: Channel(s) to modify.

params.name: factor
params.doc: Contrast boost factor. A factor of 1.0 will not affect contrast. Lower values will lessen contrast and higher values will increase contrast.

methods.name: Filter_DitherPattern
methods.signature: public void Filter_DitherPattern(Color colour)
methods.summary: Create a checkerboard dither pattern.

params.name: colour
params.doc: Colour value to set at dithered pixels.

methods.name: Filter_DropShadow
methods.signature: public void Filter_DropShadow(Size offset, int blur, double darkness)
methods.summary: Add a drop-shadow to the image. Image is not grown, so if you want the drop shadow to extend beyond the image boundaries, you have to add padding to the image first.

params.name: offset
params.doc: Number of pixels (x and y) to offset the drop shadow.

params.name: blur
params.doc: Amount of blurring for the shadow.

params.name: darkness
params.doc: Darkness factor for the shadow.

methods.name: Filter_Dullify
methods.signature: public void Filter_Dullify()
methods.summary: Reduces contrast based on opacity. This filter pulls all colours towards dull grey, without wrecking drop-shadows.

methods.name: Filter_Equalize
methods.signature: public void Filter_Equalize(GH_BitmapChannel channel, byte value)
methods.summary: Set all the values in a specific channel to a specific value.

params.name: channel
params.doc: Channel(s) to equalize.

params.name: value
params.doc: Value to equalize with.

methods.name: Filter_GreyScale()
methods.signature: public void Filter_GreyScale()
methods.summary: Convert the image to a greyscale shadow of its former self.

methods.name: Filter_GreyScale(Double)
methods.signature: public void Filter_GreyScale(double amount)
methods.summary: Convert the image to a greyscale shadow of its former self.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Greyscale factor. 1.0 equals complete greyscale, 0.0 equals no greyscale, -1.0 equals inverse greyscale

methods.name: Filter_HueScale
methods.signature: public void Filter_HueScale()
methods.summary: Convert the image to a greyscale representation of the hues.

methods.name: Filter_Invert
methods.signature: public void Filter_Invert(GH_BitmapChannel channel)
methods.summary: Invert all values in a specific channel.

params.name: channel
params.doc: Channel(s) to invert.

methods.name: Filter_LumScale
methods.signature: public void Filter_LumScale()
methods.summary: Convert the image to a greyscale representation of the luminance.

methods.name: Filter_Multiply(GH_BitmapChannel, Double)
methods.signature: public void Filter_Multiply(GH_BitmapChannel channel, double factor)
methods.summary: Multiply all values in a specific channel with a specific factor.

params.name: channel
params.doc: Channel(s) to multiply.

params.name: factor
params.doc: Multiplication factor.

methods.name: Filter_Multiply(GH_BitmapChannel, Double, Byte)
methods.signature: public void Filter_Multiply(GH_BitmapChannel channel, double factor, byte anchor)
methods.summary: Multiply all values in a specific channel with a specific factor, using a custom scaling center anchor.

params.name: channel
params.doc: Channel(s) to multiply.

params.name: factor
params.doc: Multiplication factor.

params.name: anchor
params.doc: Byte value to scale from.

methods.name: Filter_SatScale
methods.signature: public void Filter_SatScale()
methods.summary: Convert the image to a greyscale representation of the saturation.

methods.name: Filter_Shift
methods.signature: public void Filter_Shift(GH_BitmapChannel channel, byte amount)
methods.summary: Shift all values in a specific channel with a specific amount.

params.name: channel
params.doc: Channel(s) to shift.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Shift amount.

methods.name: Filter_SpectrumScale
methods.signature: public void Filter_SpectrumScale()
methods.summary: Convert the image to a spectral representation of the hues.

methods.name: Filter_Tint
methods.signature: public void Filter_Tint(Color tint, double lum_factor, double sat_factor)
methods.summary: Colorize the image using Hue and Saturation from a base colour.

params.name: tint
params.doc: Colour of colorize operation.

params.name: lum_factor
params.doc: Luminance blend factor. 0.0 equals no luminance adjustment, 1.0 equals complete luminance adjustment.

params.name: sat_factor
params.doc: Saturation blend factor. 0.0 equals no saturation adjustment, 1.0 equals complete saturation adjustment.

methods.name: G
methods.signature: public byte G(int x, int y)
methods.summary: Gets the greeb channel value at the given pixel coordinates.

params.name: x
params.doc: X coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

returns.doc: Value of Green channel at given pixel.

methods.name: OpaqueArea
methods.signature: public Rectangle OpaqueArea()
methods.summary: Find the opaque area of a bitmap. The opaque area is the rectangle that contains pixels with a colour that is not fully transparent.

returns.doc: Area of bitmap containing all non-transparent pixels.

methods.name: PadBitmap
methods.signature: public static Bitmap PadBitmap(Image bmp, Padding padding, Color padding_color)
methods.summary: Add padding edges around a bitmap.

params.name: bmp
params.doc: Source bitmap.

params.name: padding
params.doc: Padding to apply.

params.name: padding_color
params.doc: Color of padded edges.

returns.doc: A new bitmap with padded edges and the same PixelFormat as the original bitmap.

methods.name: R
methods.signature: public byte R(int x, int y)
methods.summary: Gets the red channel value at the given pixel coordinates.

params.name: x
params.doc: X coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y coordinate (column) of pixel. Must be on image interior.

returns.doc: Value of Red channel at given pixel.

methods.name: Release
methods.signature: public void Release(bool includeChanges)
methods.summary: Release the locked bits. You must call this function when you are done with this GH_MemoryBitmap instance.

params.name: includeChanges
params.doc: If true, changes to the bitmap memory block will be written back into the bitmap.

methods.name: Sample(Double, Double, Color)
methods.signature: public bool Sample(double x, double y, ref Color col)
methods.summary: Top level sampling function for interpolated sampling.

params.name: x
params.doc: floating point coordinate in pixel space.

params.name: y
params.doc: floating point coordinate in pixel space.

params.name: col
params.doc: Resulting colour

methods.name: Sample(Int32, Int32, Color)
methods.signature: public bool Sample(int x, int y, ref Color col)
methods.summary: Top level sampling function.

params.name: x
params.doc: Unmapped x pixel coordinate.

params.name: y
params.doc: Unmapped y pixel coordinate.

params.name: col
params.doc: Colour output.

returns.doc: True on success, false if pixels could not be sampled.

methods.name: ShrinkBitmap
methods.signature: public static Bitmap ShrinkBitmap(Bitmap image)
methods.summary: Shrink an image by removing all outer columns and rows that contain only fully transparent pixels.

params.name: image
params.doc: Image to shrink.

properties.name: HasAlphaChannel
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the local image has an alpha channel defined.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: Gets the height (in pixels) of the local image.

properties.name: SizeOf
properties.summary: Gets the size (in bytes) of the local image.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: Gets the width (in pixels) of the local image.
